message:
chore(audit): remove 2 duplicate aggregate entries from audit_index.jsonl

Remove two malformed multi-file aggregate audit entries that duplicated
information already present as individual per-file records. The aggregate
entries contained escaped newline-concatenated file lists that were
holdovers from an earlier batch-recording format; the canonical per-file
entries (with individual timestamps, agents, and status) remain intact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
